calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Continued To Jul-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: N.R. Patel.
Plaintiff's witness: N. R. Patel, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Robert McAdams.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street #311, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,755.00
Costs $151.30
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Arnold Evje, Esquire appearing for plaintiff.

Defendant Robert McAdams has failed to appear. Settlement conference is off calendar. Jury Demand is stricken. Matter to proceed as a court trial on July 11, 2005.

Commissioner Sue Kaplan, G. Peerless, clk.
